creator: marius@nuenneri.ch
text:
On Thu, Apr 15, 2010 at 18:20, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of x11/xlockmore,
>
> Please note that PR ports/145726 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> =C2=A0 =C2=A0http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/145726

When I use the new version I can't unlock my locked X display anymore
(failed attempt). FreeBSD 8.0-RELEASE, xorg 7.4_3. Don't you have that
problem?
